## Meeting Purpose

[Explore FWD.digital's AI-driven content marketing services for Outset's SEO needs.](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [FWD.digital offers a comprehensive AI-assisted content creation service, combining automation with human expertise for high-quality, SEO-optimized content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [The service includes in-depth research, content strategy, AI-assisted writing, and human editing, priced at $9,000/month for 50,000-100,000 words](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Results show significant organic traffic growth for clients (e.g., 24x traffic increase for DeepRamp in 3 months)](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Minimum engagement is 1 year with a 90-day pilot period, emphasizing long-term SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)

## Topics

### Outset's Current Situation

  - [Summer camp program for high school students focused on healthcare and medicine](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Successfully launched first program last summer, now scaling to other campuses](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Current marketing efforts:](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Word-of-mouth gaining traction](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Effective Google and Facebook paid advertising](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
      - [Desire to improve organic traffic and SEO, but lacking time and resources](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
      - [Trialing Graphite (Ethan Smith's SEO platform) for monitoring, not content creation](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)

### FWD.digital's Approach and Services

  - [Combines AI technology with human expertise for content creation at scale](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Process includes:](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [Extensive research on client's space and competitors](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [Content opportunity identification and prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [AI-assisted content generation with human review and editing](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Custom workflows for specific content needs (e.g., programmatic content for drug comparisons)](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Pricing: $9,000/month for 50,000-100,000 words](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [Key differentiators:](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [Not purely AI-generated content; uses AI for research synthesis and processing](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [Human editors guide content creation and ensure quality](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Customized to client's brand voice and specific requirements](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
      - [Includes strategy, execution, and ongoing optimization](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)

### Case Studies and Results

  - [DeepRamp: 24x traffic increase in 3 months, grew from 1,000 to 30,000 daily visitors](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Boost My School: Grew from ranking for \~1,000 keywords to 8,500+ keywords, with 1,000+ on the first page](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Hims: Creating programmatic content for drug comparisons with strict citation requirements](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)

### Content Creation Process

1.  Research and competitive analysis
2.  Content strategy development
3.  AI-assisted content generation
4.  Human review and editing
5.  Post-processing for brand voice alignment
6.  Ongoing optimization and refreshing of content

## Next Steps

  - [Lawson to review the information and make a decision within 3-4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [If proceeding, FWD.digital will initiate the 90-day pilot period as part of the 1-year engagement](https://fathom.video/share/GX3DG6vJ8fx_WHvoMdKy6ASMB9Bj9iyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
